label: Resume
heading: Professional Profile
profileText: Full-stack JavaScript developer with a background in architecture. I bring a unique perspective to software development — combining structural thinking, design precision, and engineering discipline to build applications that are both technically robust and thoughtfully crafted.
archText: Before transitioning into software engineering, I studied architecture at university. This background taught me to think in systems, to balance aesthetics with function, and to approach every project with a blueprint-level attention to detail. These principles now define how I write code and design systems.
